THE THIRD PHASE MAY ALSO BE AWARDED AS ADDITIONAL FUNDING IS AVAILABLE. THE THIRD PHASE INCLUDES COMPLETING THE EIS AND ASSOCIATED DOCUMENTS. UNDER THE THIRD PHASE THE CONTRACTOR WOULD COMPLETE: (1) TWO INTERNAL DRAFT EISS WITH  REVISIONS AND REPRINTING AFTER EACH REVIEW, (2) OTHER REQUIRED ENVIRONMENTAL AND REGULATORY DOCUMENTS, (3) A CAMERA READY DRAFT EIS FOR PUBLIC REVIEW, (4) PUBLIC REVIEW OF THE DRAFT EIS, (5) ANALYSIS OF ALL COMMENTS ON THE DRAFT EIS, (6) A FINAL EIS, (7) NOTICES OF AVAILABILITY, (8) A RECORD OF DECISION, (9) ADMINISTRATIVE RECORD, AND (10) MONTHLY STATUS CALLS.
